labels.name: nmlp_get_pillar_guides
labels.description: Get NMLP's pillar guide manifest — 60+ Southwest author/publisher authentication and pricing guides.

labels.name: nmlp_identify_first_edition
labels.description: Identify whether a specific book is a first edition. Given a title (and optionally author), returns that title's POINTS OF ISSUE — the exact details that mark a true first printing — plus true-first precedence (US vs UK), book-club/reprint tells, publisher, year, the human-readable page URL, and a c

labels.name: nmlp_decode_number_line
labels.description: Decode a copyright-page number line / printer's key (and any 'First Edition' wording) to determine which printing a book is. Paste the row of small numbers and/or the edition statement. Handles the Random-House-ends-in-2 exception and flags book-club editions. Returns the printing, a plain-English v

labels.name: nmlp_lookup_publisher_rules
labels.description: Look up a publisher's first-edition identification conventions — how that house designated a first printing across eras (stated-edition wording, number lines, colophons, dated printings). Covers 850+ publishers.

labels.name: nmlp_search_titles
labels.description: Search the first-edition title reference by title or author. Returns matching collectible titles with their per-title identification-page URLs. Use nmlp_identify_first_edition for the full points of one specific title.

labels.name: nmlp_lccn_lookup
labels.description: Resolve a Library of Congress Catalog Card Number (LCCN) to title, author, year, publisher, ISBN, and ASIN. The missing barcode for pre-ISBN (pre-1967) books: users read the number off the copyright page ('Library of Congress Catalog Card Number: 63-12345'). Dashes and spaces optional. Backed by 20M

labels.name: nmlp_cd_lookup
labels.description: Identify a CD from any number printed on it: DIDX hub/master IDs (DIDX-2113), label catalog numbers (CK 40999), barcodes, or music-club 'D ######' numbers. Returns artist, album, year, label. Backed by NMLP's Discogs-derived identifier index plus MusicBrainz fallback. Human tool: https://newmexicoli

labels.name: nmlp_vinyl_lookup
labels.description: Identify a vinyl record from the matrix/runout etching in the deadwax (stamper suffixes vary copy to copy, so stable-prefix matching is built in), the label catalog number, or the barcode. Returns artist, album, year, label, catalog number. Backed by NMLP's Discogs-derived vinyl identifier index plu

labels.name: nmlp_resolve
labels.description: One Box: resolve ANY physical-media identifier in one call — auto-detects the type (Library of Congress LCCN, ISBN-10/13, CD DIDX hub code, label catalog number, UPC/EAN barcode, vinyl matrix/runout etching) and returns ranked typed candidates across NMLP's 48M-record indexes (20.9M LCCN + 8.7M CD +

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: nmlp_check_coverage, nmlp_search_qa, nmlp_search_titles · Private data: nmlp_get_archive, nmlp_lccn_lookup, nmlp_vinyl_lookup, nmlp_resolve · Public sink: nmlp_schedule_pickup.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: nmlp_check_coverage, nmlp_search_qa, nmlp_search_titles · Private data: nmlp_get_archive, nmlp_lccn_lookup, nmlp_vinyl_lookup, nmlp_resolve · Public sink: nmlp_schedule_pickup

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
